description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a light beige exterior and a gable roof covered in brown shingles. The front features a covered porch with outdoor seating, flanked by lush landscaping including palm trees and shrubs. The rear of the property boasts a swimming pool, a patio area, and additional greenery, creating a private outdoor retreat. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The property is enclosed by low walls, with paved walkways and a driveway visible on one side. The overall design is open and inviting, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A single-story beige bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, lush landscaping, and a backyard pool, enclosed by low walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, symmetrical windows, and dense landscaping with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side garden, and partial view of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and open backyard with additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the side garden, palm trees, and a glimpse of the rear patio and pool.
